comments.title: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet — write the first one!

embed.loginBlocked: Your browser blocks signing in inside the embedded widget.
embed.notRegisteredText: The comment widget is not registered for this domain or content type. Operators can register domains in the dashboard under "Embed sites".

embedAdmin.title: Embed sites
embedAdmin.subtitle: Registered embedder domains of the comment widget: only these websites may embed the widget (frame-ancestors CSP). Changes apply immediately.
embedAdmin.hostHelp: Canonical hostname of the embedding page, lowercase, without https:// — e.g. blog.customer.com
embedAdmin.label: Display name (optional)
embedAdmin.targetTypesHelp: Comma-separated, e.g. blog, page — empty = all content types allowed.

disabled.title: Comments disabled
disabled.text: New comments are currently disabled. Existing comments stay visible.
disabled.maintenanceText: New comments are paused during maintenance. Existing comments stay visible.
disabled.maintenanceToast: Maintenance mode — commenting is temporarily locked.

form.error: The comment could not be saved.

validation.contentRequired: The comment must not be empty
validation.guestNameRequired: Please enter a name (at least 2 characters)
validation.guestEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
